title: EUSPA procurement: market-uptake support services for Copernicus downstream
summary: EUSPA has published a procurement opportunity for services supporting market uptake and user engagement across the Copernicus downstream sectors.
body: A new EUSPA procurement targets support services for Copernicus market development, including stakeholder engagement, use-case development and adoption monitoring across transport, mobility and environmental sectors. Interested parties should consult the EUSPA procurement portal for tender documents and deadlines.
